hero.title: Declarative Cloud-Native Intelligent Networking
hero.subtitle: Built on zero-trust architecture and Kubernetes-native orchestration, Lattice delivers a high-performance, transparent, and observable mesh network layer for heterogeneous multi-cloud and edge environments.

features.label: Core Features
features.title: A Networking Platform Built for Cloud-Native
features.subtitle: Combining the simplicity of WireGuard with the declarative power of Kubernetes to create next-generation automated network orchestration infrastructure.
features.card_1_desc: Deeply integrated with the Kubernetes ecosystem, define network topology through declarative CRDs — network as code.
features.card_2_desc: Leverage eBPF for in-kernel packet processing, bypassing the protocol stack to improve throughput performance and observability.
features.card_3_desc: Identity-based zero-trust WireGuard tunnels with end-to-end encryption — no need to trust the underlying network.

architecture.label: Infrastructure as Code
architecture.title: One Command, Nodes Connected
architecture.subtitle: Declarative commands enable automatic node discovery and handshake, simplifying complex networking logic into a single deployment command.
architecture.step_1_desc: Define network logical boundaries and generate an access token.
architecture.step_2_desc: Execute on the target machine — automatic handshake and tunnel establishment.
architecture.step_3_desc: Node registered, control plane pushes policies in real-time.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Community edition is free forever. Pro unlocks enterprise monitoring, SSO, and advanced networking features.
pricing.pro_disclaimer: No credit card required · Auto-downgrades to Community after trial
pricing.enterprise_text: Need more than 500 nodes or have compliance requirements?

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Onboard your first node in 5 minutes. No firewall changes required. Compatible with any cloud provider and bare metal.
